user           - extendLock (permissionless keeper action)           - isRecoveryMode / currentTCR views (read-only protocol health)         What is explicitly OUT of scope for Phase 1:           - d9e5173bb54f8e990f4fe70f461c7df0a1d9999b3f74ea26f6e2e609","dweb:/ipfs/QmNoMuJGv54PpMUj7Bxq91jgTcm5MDBH3d6bJDP9yevErg"]}},"version":1}

acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner.

CCR().notice: Mirrors the Critical Collateral Ratio that triggers Recovery Mode.

MCR().notice: Mirrors the protocol's Minimum Collateral Ratio.

claimFees().notice: Transfer all pending fee rewards to the caller.

currentTCR().notice: Current Total Collateral Ratio of the underlying protocol.

deposit(uint256).notice: Lock `amount` of `asset` as veBTC and receive shares.         Deposits are rejected once the current epoch has ended.

extendLock().notice: Push the lock expiry forward by `lockDuration` from now.         Permissionless so keepers can call it before the epoch closes.

feeToken().notice: Token in which protocol fees are denominated (must differ from `asset`).

harvest().notice: Pull accumulated fees from the FeeDistributor and credit all         current share holders pro-rata. Permissionless — anyone can call.

isRecoveryMode().notice: True when the underlying protocol is in Recovery Mode (TCR < CCR).

lockDuration().notice: How far ahead the next lock extends when a deposit arrives or extendLock is called.

lockEnd().notice: Epoch end timestamp (week-aligned). Deposits close; withdrawals open.

pendingFees(address).notice: Claimable fee balance for `user` (including unharvested protocol fees).

rewardPerShareStored().notice: Synthetix-style accumulated reward per share (scaled by PRECISION).

totalPrincipal().notice: Total principal locked in veBTC. Tracked explicitly so fee-token balance can never be mistaken for withdrawable principal.

withdraw(uint256).notice: Redeem `shareAmount` shares for proportional principal after lock expires.         The first caller after expiry triggers the veBTC unlock for everyone.
